raw.official description: Sprint’s speed is increased by 20% and reload can be performed while sprint is active.
Biotic Field’s healing is increased by 100% on allies below half health.
Sprint's movement speed bonus gradually increases by an additional 25% over 2 seconds.

raw.official description: Helix Rockets' projectile speed is increased by 50%.
Helix Rockets reload 15 ammo if they damage an enemy.

abilities.name: Tactical Salvo

raw.official description: During Tactical Visor, Helix Rockets' cooldown is reduced by 80% and no longer interrupts firing Heavy Pulse Rifle.
raw.ability details:
* Instantly applies to Helix Rocket if it is on cooldown when Tactical Visor is activated.
* Cooldown reduction applies in full as long as it is fired before Tactical Visor ends.

warnings: cooldown has multiple values; only the first number was parsed.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.ability details:
* After Sprint is cancelled, there is a 0.3 second recovery period where Soldier: 76 cannot use primary or secondary fire.
* The activation of the ability can be customized between holding the button and toggling with a single press.
* Sprint's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Biotic Field
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Deploy a field that heals you and your allies.
raw.heal: 40 per second
raw.ability details: * Cannot be destroyed. * Only one field can be active at a time. * Healing is only applied to targets within line of sight of the biotic emitter, ignoring enemy [[barriers]]. * Can be placed on and lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] if the latter was deployed first. If the platform is destroyed, it will fall on the ground.

heal.raw: 40 per second

raw.official description: Stim Pack replaces Biotic Field. On use, Soldier: 76 heals for 30 health per second and gains 20% increased attack speed for 5 seconds.
raw.heal: 30 per second
raw.ability details:
* Cooldown starts when the effect ends.
* Area of effect benefits from Biotic Field are lost; Both healing and attack speed from Stim Pack only affect Soldier: 76.

heal.raw: 30 per second

raw.official description: Launch a volley of explosive rockets.
raw.damage:
40 (direct hit bonus)
80 – 40 (splash, enemy)
40 – 20 (splash, self)
raw.ability details: * The explosion also applies a knockback. * Soldier: 76 takes 50% of the splash damage and will be affected by the knockback, if caught in the explosion. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Automatically aims your weapon at targets in view.
raw.ability details: * Activation of Tactical Visor instantly replenishes [[File:icon-ability.hpr.png|middle|link=Soldier: 76#Heavy Pulse Rifle|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Heavy Pulse Rifle|Heavy Pulse Rifle]]'s ammo and cancels the recovery animation of [[File:Quick melee.png|sub|link=Melee#Quick Melee|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Melee#Quick Melee|Quick Melee]], [[File:icon-ability.helixrockets.png|sub|link=Soldier: 76#Helix Rockets|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Helix Rockets|Helix Rockets]], [[File:icon-ability.bioticfield.png|sub|link=Soldier: 76#Biotic Field|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Biotic Field|Biotic Field]] and ''Could not find 'Stim Pack' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. * Heavy Pulse Rifle's reload time is greatly reduced while Tactical Visor is active. * Damage falloff still applies. * Tactical Visor auto-aims Heavy Pulse Rifle at the enemy closest to the reticle within the targeting area. ** Can target enemy heroes, [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]], [[File:Ability-Junkrat5.png|sub|link=Junkrat#RIP-Tire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#RIP-Tire|RIP-Tire]], and [[File:Baptiste-ability3.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Immortality Field|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Immortality Field|Immortality Field]]. Other [[deployables]] can only be (manually) shot if there are no valid targets for auto-aim. ** Soldier: 76 will only lock on to a target if their center of mass is visible and not behind an enemy [[barrier]]. * Soldier: 76 can [[headshot]] during Tactical Visor only if the shot would have been a headshot without it. Additionally, it is possible to land headshots without aiming at the target's head during some posture changing actions, such as Zenyatta's animation when he fires an orb volley. * Auto-aim does not apply to [[File:icon-ability.helixrockets.png|sub|link=Soldier: 76#Helix Rockets|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Helix Rockets|Helix Rockets]].
